title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Granules India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Granules India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Granules India in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Granules India:
Granules India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Granules India!
